chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 181 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.29 2. For order on CMA No.2025/2025 3. For hearing of main case 13.04.2026 Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel questions proposed for determination had already been decided against the applicant department by virtue of order dated 15.01.2025 passed by the honourable Supreme Court in CPLA 1091-K/2022. He states that the said order is squarely binding upon this court, therefore, in mutatis mutandis application thereof, this reference application may be dismissed. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
